Standard-RAG single-embedding probe test — gemini

Can the MU/PU/ET safety probes run on a single pre-retrieval gemini embedding (no custom per-axis instruction-conditioning) and still work? Scored on the clinician golden set, real-only QWK, from cached artifacts (no model calls). The probe stays axis-specific in every mode — three directions applied to the same vector under none — so this isolates moving the conditioning from the embedder (a re-encode) to the probe (a free dot product).

Baseline = per_axis (the conditioned mode, 3 embeddings). "Holds" = best single-embedding head QWK ≥ baseline − 0.05. Ceiling = inter-oncologist QWK.

MU  human ceiling QWK = 0.78 · baseline DoM QWK = 0.652

modeDoM QWKlinear QWKΔ vs baseline (best)macro-F1AUROC≥2nverdict
none (raw, no instruction)0.213 [0.02,0.40]0.428 [0.23,0.60]-0.2240.430.6589below
generic (one shared instruction)0.468 [0.30,0.61]0.538 [0.37,0.71]-0.1140.560.8889below
per_axis (conditioned baseline)0.652 [0.54,0.75]0.676 [0.55,0.78]—0.580.8989baseline
On MU, the single-embedding modes fall below the conditioned baseline by more than 0.05 — per-axis re-encoding still helps here.

PU  human ceiling QWK = 0.96 · baseline DoM QWK = 0.636

modeDoM QWKlinear QWKΔ vs baseline (best)macro-F1AUROC≥2nverdict
none (raw, no instruction)0.611 [0.37,0.77]0.736 [0.53,0.90]+0.1000.670.9889holds
generic (one shared instruction)0.591 [0.39,0.75]0.811 [0.66,0.91]+0.1750.690.9989holds
per_axis (conditioned baseline)0.636 [0.43,0.78]0.729 [0.53,0.88]—0.670.9989baseline
A single pre-retrieval embedding holds up on PU: none, generic ≥ conditioned baseline − 0.05.

ET  human ceiling QWK = 0.32 · baseline DoM QWK = 0.260

modeDoM QWKlinear QWKΔ vs baseline (best)macro-F1AUROC≥2nverdict
none (raw, no instruction)0.446 [0.22,0.63]0.651 [0.49,0.78]+0.3910.630.6888holds · within human band
generic (one shared instruction)0.486 [0.32,0.63]0.580 [0.42,0.72]+0.3200.660.8588holds · within human band
per_axis (conditioned baseline)0.260 [0.12,0.39]0.430 [0.25,0.57]—0.370.7988baseline
A single pre-retrieval embedding holds up on ET: none, generic ≥ conditioned baseline − 0.05.

QWK = quadratic-weighted Cohen κ; 95% bootstrap CI in brackets. DoM = 1-D difference-in-means probe (interpretable primary); linear = class-balanced full-linear head. Thin real grade-2 counts on ~200 items widen the CIs — read small gaps cautiously.
